steps.title: Use the margin of error
steps.content: The estimate is $38\%$, and the margin of error is $2.76\%$. The plausible interval is found by subtracting and adding the margin of error.

steps.title: Match the conclusion
steps.content: The most plausible conclusion is that the true percentage is between $35.24\%$ and $40.76\%$. The answer is B.
